rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF YUE-CHYOU YANG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Petition To Set Priority Of Use Of Resources To Satisfy Earlier Order For Attorneys' Fees And Order Payment By 7/31/10
rulings.Rulings: Following a hearing held on 7/6/10, the request to set priority of use of resources to satisfy attorney's fees was denied, along with the request for the payment of interest on said fees; attorney's fees are to be paid from resources received in the conservatorship estate following the liquidation of savings bonds; a status hearing on the payment of said fees was set for 8/17/10 and continued to 9/21/10. A receipt for payment of said fees was filed on 9/7/10. The findings and order following the hearing on 7/6/10 are the subject of a separate order, approved as to form, to be signed by Judge Wiss; the status hearing on the filing of the receipt for the payment of attorney's fees is taken off calendar.
